headline: Tencent hits all-time high at 19.3% share
summary: Tencent/hy3-20260706:free set an all-time token-share record of 19.3%, extending its lead atop the rankings. Anthropic/claude-sonnet-5-20260630 also hit a new high at 2.3%. Moonshot AI surged +1.2 percentage points in daily provider share, while OpenAI fell -1.2 points.
highlights: New entrants: Moonshot AI kimi-k3 & kimi-k2.5, NVIDIA nemotron-3-super, OpenAI gpt-5.2
